mapper.select: SELECT * FROM weapon_info ORDER BY rarity DESC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO weapon_info (name, rarity, weapon_type, base_atk, sub_stat_type, sub_stat_value, skill_name, skill_desc, image_url) VALUES (#{name}, #{rarity}, #{weaponType}, #{baseAtk}, #{subStatType}, #{subStatValue}, #{skillName}, #{skillDesc}, #{imageUrl})
